project.name: ION TUI 仪表板
project.styleDefinitionBrief: AI Agent 编排平台终端仪表板，深色背景 + 青色强调，等宽字体，工业/实用主义风格，三栏布局模拟 TUI 界面
project.designRead: TUI dashboard / developer engineers / industrial terminal utilitarian / high density / avoid generic web dashboard

pages.title: 主面板
pages.visualNorthStar: Three-column TUI terminal layout: left workspace sidebar, center Agent conversation panel, right dashboard with TODO/process monitor/logs. Monospace-only typography. Cyan accent borders. Zero border-radius aesthetic. Status indicators via colored Unicode circles. Keyboard shortcut hints in status bar.
pages.compositionPattern: Three-column fixed-grid dashboard. Left sidebar (220px): project tree with expand/collapse. Center panel (flex): header bar + scrollable conversation area + input bar. Right sidebar (300px): stacked panels (TODO, process monitor, logs) with compact headers.

continuityAnchors.typographySystem: Monospace-only: JetBrains Mono / Fira Code / Consolas fallback. All text rendered in monospace font including labels and UI chrome.
continuityAnchors.colorSystem: Deep navy bg #0d1117, cyan accent #00d4aa, secondary text #8b949e, border #30363d. High-contrast terminal aesthetic.
continuityAnchors.densityModel: Compact: 12-13px base font, tight line-height 1.25-1.5, minimal padding (8-12px panel gaps), max information density.
continuityAnchors.shapeLanguage: Square/rectangular panels with thin 1px borders. No rounded corners on cards/panels. Sharp, precise, utilitarian.
